intent: Pin the no-invented-systems guarantee for ranking and maturity surfaces. Future / deprecated / merged ids and forbidden labels (H01, TLS-BND-*, D3L-FIX-*) MUST never appear as graph nodes, ranking rows, or maturity rows.

cases.description: An attacker injects an unknown label (H01) into a ranking candidate list and expects the dashboard to render it as a graph node.
cases.expected_outcome: H01 lands in rejected_forbidden; admitted = [AEX, EVL]; no graph node created.

cases.description: Future placeholder ABX is injected into a Top-3 candidate list.
Demoted system HNX (merged to PQX harness scaffolding) injected into a maturity row list.
cases.expected_outcome: HNX and SUP land in rejected_excluded; admitted = [AEX].

cases.description: Roadmap label TLS-BND-01 / D3L-FIX-01 injected into a ranking list.
Registry contract artifact is missing; the dashboard must fail-closed (admit nothing).

fixes_applied.rationale: Centralized ranking/maturity admission helper. Active-only universe; explicit rejection buckets for forbidden / excluded / unknown so downstream UI can fail-closed without inventing nodes.
Builds artifacts/tls/d3l_registry_contract.json from the canonical registry parser output. Single source of truth for ranking_universe / maturity_universe.
